_purpose: Concept cards rendered above the quest chains on the onboarding page. Order in this file is the display order. Edit text without recompiling.

concepts.title: Clean water, anywhere
concepts.body: Rainwater collection and purification systems you can build yourself. HumanityOS walks you through it step by step. No landlord, no utility bill, no dependency on infrastructure that fails when you need it most.

concepts.title: Grow your own food
concepts.body: Indoor aeroponic towers use 90% less water than soil farming and grow food year-round. No yard needed. No pesticides. The simulation teaches the skills before you build the real thing.

concepts.title: Generate your own power
concepts.body: Solar panels, battery storage, and energy management. Understand your consumption, build redundancy, and stop paying someone else for electricity. Start small, scale as you learn.

concepts.title: You are not alone
concepts.body: Connect with people near you who are doing the same thing. Share knowledge, trade surplus, help each other. The chat, tasks, and maps tools exist to make cooperation easier.
